dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry: Price breaks below 1,400 support level AND closes below 20MA AND has not crossed above 1,460 monthly pivot. Exit: Reversal above 1,460 pivot (AUTHOR_SILENT condition replaced with reasonable reversal). Stop loss set at 2.86% (40 points distance to S3 at 1,366 / 1,400 entry). Target regime changed from TRENDING to TRENDING_DOWN for SHORT direction clarity.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry: Price breaks below 1,400 support level AND closes below 20MA AND has not crossed above 1,460 monthly pivot. Exit: Reversal above 1,460 pivot (AUTHOR_SILENT condition replaced with reasonable reversal). Stop loss set at 2.86% (40 points distance to S3 at 1,366 / 1,400 entry). Target regime changed from TRENDING to TRENDING_DOWN for SHORT direction clarity.

source_rule_text: Short when price breaks below the multi-month support level, signaling further weakness with potential cascading support breaks.
